body_transformation: The serpentine body now features deep crimson scales with molten gold highlights along the spine, their smooth texture replaced by a cracked magma surface that glows faintly orange at the fissures. Delicate fin-like structures along the spine transform into rigid, ember-scaled plates that shimmer with heat distortion, while the pointed head retains its single eyelid but now has a faint amber glow in the eye socket. The tail tip develops a flame-tipped extension with crackling embers, and the body curvature subtly shifts to mimic the heat-haze distortion of rising flames. Smooth water droplets are entirely replaced by smoldering ash particles clinging to the scales.
signature_feature: Tail tip: molten gold flame with crackling ember particles and heat-haze distortion.
